name: GFX Library for Arduino
description: Waveshare-bundled Arduino_GFX (ESP32-S3-Touch-LCD-3.5, non-B). Provides Arduino_ST7796 with Waveshare's panel init. Arduino_ESP32SPI.cpp patched for arduino-esp32 3.x (2-arg spiFrequencyToClockDiv). Unused QSPI/SPIDMA databus files excluded (they target the old core and aren't needed for the ST7796 SPI panel).
